text: There is a sense of anticipation as I enter this space. The glass and the clean lines inspire a feeling of modernity and intention. Entering further, I notice words on the wall: 'I sense confusion and a lack of clarity.' These words echo within me, matching the slight disorientation from the slanted, surreal view. I feel reflective—caught between curiosity, the promise of innovation, and an awareness of my own limitations in perception. The focus on research and development makes me ponder on the nature of progress and the complexity of understanding the world around me.
